exposure.notes: collected from behind a breakwater protecting the mouth of a small creek off Magnetic Island. Coarse material was removed with a set of sieves, and the <125 lm sediment fraction was kept in aerated sea water until further use. water rich in TEP was collected from the outflow of a 5000 l prawn holding tank at the AIMS mariculture facility. flow-through was stopped overnight after the prawns were fed in the afternoon. the next morning, water from the mid-water column of the prawn tank was collected in a 150-l container.
